query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS specialist_tracks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  familyMemberId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  userId INT,
  fullName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  dateOfBirth TIMESTAMP NULL,
  currentAge INT,
  hasWorkPermit BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  workPermitExpiry TIMESTAMP NULL,
  educationStatus ENUM('in_high_school', 'high_school_diploma', 'academy_enrolled', 'academy_graduate', 'ged', 'college_enrolled', 'college_graduate') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'in_high_school',
  educationVerifiedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  currentLevel ENUM('specialist_i', 'specialist_ii', 'specialist_iii', 'associate') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'specialist_i',
  employmentType ENUM('part_time_20', 'part_time_25', 'part_time_30', 'full_time') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'part_time_20',
  entityId VARCHAR(100),
  entityName VARCHAR(255),
  department VARCHAR(100),
  positionTitle VARCHAR(255),
  supervisorId VARCHAR(100),
  supervisorName VARCHAR(255),
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(10,2),
  tokenAllocationMonthly INT DEFAULT 0,
  trackStartDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  currentLevelStartDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  expectedGraduationDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  acceleratedTrack BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  maturityScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  lastMaturityAssessment TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('pending_eligibility', 'active', 'on_hold', 'graduated', 'terminated', 'transferred') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending_eligibility',
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS specialist_maturity_assessments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  specialistTrackId INT NOT NULL,
  assessmentPeriod VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  assessmentDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  assessorId VARCHAR(100),
  assessorName VARCHAR(255),
  academyModulesCompleted INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  academyModulesTarget INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  academyScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  academyNotes TEXT,
  simulatorSessionsCompleted INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  simulatorAverageScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  simulatorScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  simulatorNotes TEXT,
  attendanceRating INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  punctualityRating INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  initiativeRating INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  teamworkRating INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  qualityOfWorkRating INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  supervisorScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  supervisorComments TEXT,
  tokensEarned INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  tokensSpentWisely BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  tokenSavingsRate DECIMAL(5,2),
  tokenEconomyScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  tokenEconomyNotes TEXT,
  budgetAdherence BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  expenseReportingAccuracy INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  financialGoalsMet INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  fiscalScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  fiscalNotes TEXT,
  totalScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  recommendsAdvancement BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  recommendedLevel ENUM('specialist_i', 'specialist_ii', 'specialist_iii', 'associate'),
  advancementJustification TEXT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'submitted', 'reviewed', 'approved', 'contested') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS specialist_milestones (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  specialistTrackId INT NOT NULL,
  milestoneType ENUM('level_advancement', 'hours_milestone', 'academy_completion', 'simulator_mastery', 'first_project_lead', 'mentorship_start', 'full_time_transition', 'graduation_ceremony') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  achievedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  previousLevel VARCHAR(50),
  newLevel VARCHAR(50),
  certificateIssued BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  certificateId INT,
  tokenBonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ceremonyScheduled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ceremonyDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ceremonyNotes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
